email_welcome_body: Your account has been created. You can now join challenges, face other players and earn RivalCoins.
email_welcome_how: How does it work? Top up your RB balance, create or join a challenge, play your match and submit your results. Simple and fast.
email_welcome_footer: You're receiving this email because you just signed up.
email_reset_subtitle: A password reset request has been made for your Rivalbet account.
email_reset_body: Click the button below to choose a new password. This link is valid for 60 minutes.
email_reset_warning: If you didn't request this, just ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
email_reset_fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link in your browser:
email_reset_footer2: You're receiving this email because a password reset was requested for this account.
email_match_greeting_won: Congratulations! You won this match and your earnings have been credited to your balance.
email_match_greeting_lost: You lost this match. Don't give up, come back stronger!
email_ready_hint: Open the chat to mark your turn and start the match.
email_ready_wish: Good luck and may the best player win! 🏆
